leadText: Magnet Bomb (Japanese: マグネットボム Magnet Bomb) is a damage-dealing Steel-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is TM126 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation IV to VII 1.2 Generation VIII 1.3 Generation IX 1.3.1 Pokémon Scarlet and Violet 1.3.2 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV to VII [ edit | edit source ] Magnet Bomb inflicts damage and bypasses accuracy checks to always hit, unless the target is in the semi-invulnerable turn of a move such as Dig or Fly . Magnet Bomb does not affect targets with Bulletproof . Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Magnet Bomb cannot be selected in a battle. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Scarlet and Violet [ edit | edit source ] Magnet Bomb cannot be selected in a battle. Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Starting from the Mega Dimension DLC, Magnet Bomb is selectable again. Magnet Bomb's power has been increased from 60 to 95. Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Physical Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power 95 114 Cooldown 8s Move wind-up time 20 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect — — — None
